info.name: Microsoft Azure PeeringManagementClient
info.description: APIs to manage Peering resources through the Azure Resource Manager.

{subscriptionId}
providers
Microsoft.Peering
CheckServiceProviderAvailability
Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Providers Microsoft Peering Checkserviceprovideravailability

request.description: Checks if the peering service provider is present within 1000 miles of customer's location

response.name: Error response describing why the operation has failed.
